results.term: It has been going on for over ten years now. I can...

turn_info.speaker: seeker
turn_info.content: It has been going on for over ten years now. I can't hardly walk and I can't hardly sit still.

results.term: Yes, I have had back surgery, tried Yoga, and chir...

turn_info.speaker: seeker
turn_info.content: Yes, I have had back surgery, tried Yoga, and chiropractors, and physical therapy. Nothing has worked.

results.term: It is just hard, waking up in the middle of the ni...

turn_info.speaker: seeker
turn_info.content: It is just hard, waking up in the middle of the night with pain and not being able to go back to sleep. It drives me nuts some days and I just stay away from everyone.

results.term: I try to hide the pain from my family because the ...

turn_info.speaker: seeker
turn_info.content: I try to hide the pain from my family because the man of the house is suppose to be strong and provide for his family. I have a very loving wife and a set of twin boys that just turned 13. I am blessed in so many ways but I still seem to have to suffer to enjoy it.

results.term: I feel your pain, I have came a long way in managi...

turn_info.speaker: seeker
turn_info.content: I feel your pain, I have came a long way in managing the pain mentally. I try to block it out and keep my mind busy to not think about it. Sometimes it works, sometimes it doesn't.

results.term: I have sever spinal stenosis and a deteriorating b...

turn_info.speaker: seeker
turn_info.content: I have sever spinal stenosis and a deteriorating bone disease. The surgeon said it was worse than he thought and he done all he could. He was afraid to go any deeper because I might not walk again if he did.

results.term: Thanks for the words of encouragement. It makes me...

turn_info.speaker: seeker
turn_info.content: Thanks for the words of encouragement. It makes me feel better knowing that people in the real world still care about others and how they feel.

turn_info.content: Sounds great, I will check into it with my doctor. Have a nice day.
